findings.title: High-severity dependency vulnerability
findings.description: A transitive dependency has a known remote code execution advisory.
findings.impact: An attacker could trigger code execution through the vulnerable path.
findings.remediation: Upgrade the affected package to a patched version and rebuild the SBOM.

findings.title: Token-like value committed to repository
findings.description: A value matching a token pattern is present in a tracked file.
findings.impact: Committed secrets can leak through clones, forks, and build logs.
findings.remediation: Remove the value, rotate it, and move secrets to a managed store.

findings.title: Outdated direct dependency
findings.remediation: Update the dependency to the current supported release.
